description: User clicks on the sidebar item 'I can easily find and understand...' to view results for that specific question.
interaction_target: I can easily find and understand...
page_title: Askable - Participant App: Wallet Core Flows & Expectations
frame_description: The user is viewing the 'Path analysis' for the 'View your transaction history' task and moves the cursor to the sidebar.

description: The main content area updates to show a bar chart and individual responses for the selected question.
frame_description: The path analysis view is replaced by a question results view with a bar chart showing agreement levels.

description: User clicks back on 'View your transaction history' in the sidebar.
frame_description: The user moves the cursor back to the task item in the sidebar.

description: The main content area updates back to the path analysis view for the task.
frame_description: The screen refreshes to show the mobile screen mockups and path statistics.

description: User clicks on the 'Heat map' tab to view click density.
frame_description: The user selects the heat map tab from the top of the path analysis section.

description: A heat map overlay appears over the page, showing a mobile screen mockup with click hotspots.
frame_description: A dark overlay with a mobile screen mockup and colored hotspots appears.

description: User hovers over the 'Close' (X) button on the heat map overlay.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the close button in the top right corner of the overlay.

description: User clicks the 'Close' button to exit the heat map view.
frame_description: The user activates the close button.

description: The heat map overlay closes, returning the user to the path analysis view.
frame_description: The dark overlay disappears, revealing the underlying results page.

description: User hovers over the 'Misclick rate' information icon.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the small info icon next to the misclick rate metric.

description: User clicks on the sidebar item 'I can easily find and understand...' again.
interaction_target: I can easily find and understand...
frame_description: The user navigates back to the question results via the sidebar.

description: The main content area updates to show the results for the selected question.
frame_description: The bar chart view for the question agreement level reappears.

description: User clicks on the sidebar item 'Where would you expect to find this information?' to view card sort results.
interaction_target: Where would you expect to find this information?
frame_description: The user selects the card sort question from the sidebar.

description: The main content area updates to show card sort results, including cards and categories.
frame_description: The view changes to show a list of cards and their categorization statistics.

description: User scrolls down the card sort results page to view the agreement matrix.
frame_description: The page content moves vertically as the user scrolls down past the card list.

description: User scrolls further down to view the similarity matrix and individual responses.
frame_description: The user continues scrolling to the bottom of the results page.

description: User clicks on the sidebar item 'I can easily find and understand...' once more.
interaction_target: I can easily find and understand...
frame_description: The user returns to the agreement question results.

description: The main content area updates to show the question results.
frame_description: The bar chart view loads again.

description: User hovers over the 'Hide filter' icon in the top right of the results panel.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the eye icon with a slash.

description: User clicks the 'Hide filter' icon to collapse the filter sidebar.
frame_description: The user activates the hide filter toggle.

description: The filter sidebar on the right collapses, and the main content area expands.
frame_description: The right-hand panel disappears, and the charts expand to fill the width.

description: User clicks the 'Show filter' icon to reopen the filter sidebar.
frame_description: The user clicks the eye icon to restore the filters.

description: The filter sidebar reappears on the right side of the screen.
frame_description: The right-hand panel with filter options slides back into view.

description: User hovers over the 'Hide filter' icon again.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the filter toggle icon.

description: User clicks the 'Hide filter' icon to collapse the sidebar again.
frame_description: The user hides the filter panel once more.

description: The filter sidebar collapses.
frame_description: The right-hand panel is hidden.

description: User hovers over cells in the agreement matrix to see detailed percentages.
frame_description: The cursor moves across the blue-shaded cells of the agreement matrix.

description: User clicks on the sidebar item 'I would prefer my transaction history to show:' to view results for that question.
interaction_target: I would prefer my transaction history to show:
frame_description: The user selects a multiple-choice question from the sidebar.

description: The main content area updates to show the results for the selected multiple-choice question.
frame_description: The view changes to show a bar chart for the transaction history preference question.
